title: HaxR's Wither Lords
description: A resource pack that makes Hypixel Skyblock's iconic Wither Lords into cooler and more distinguishable versions of themselves!
body:
## ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d798bf875fc64697b45a6bde1aa011e9d4d4f969.png) ![Wither Lords Key Arts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33bdd26a29b3068a2bfec543a837f7627b01b95c.jpeg)

## About **HaxR's Wither Lords** is a resource pack for Hypixel Skyblock which gives the Wither Lords of Catacombs Floor 7 a new look. The once plain Maxor, Storm, Goldor, Necron and the Wither King are now distinguished from one another with outfits based of their areas in the factory!

## IMPORTANT NOTE This pack is very early into development! If you are using this pack alongside any other resource pack that changes the Wither, you have to disable it in other for this pack to work. Even having both on at the same time and having this pack prioritized will not fix it for the time being.

## Required Dependencies [![Click me](https://github.com/Traben-0/Entity_Model_Features/blob/master/src/main/resources/icon.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) [![Click me](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Traben-0/Entity_Texture_Features/master/.github/README-assets/icon.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) **These dependencies will be automatically installed if the resource pack is added via Modrinth!**

## Known Bugs - Due to how textures are assigned, Witherborns, Vanquishers, and Smog will also inherit the models/textures. - If the Wither King does not load, go under the purple dragon statue the return.

## Credits - **Minedollcat** - Legacy Wither Lords Pack - Wither King model - Height Assignment Code - **FSR** - Granting permission to use their textures for Goldor and the Wither King - Support their resource pack in the link below and join their [discord server](https://discord.com/invite/fsr)!
